narrative_beat: O engano perfeito — a pessoa olha no espelho e seu reflexo é um ser diferente, construído pela IA para substituí-la

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

shot.camera_angle: 3/4 side angle showing both person and mirror reflection
shot.depth_of_field: both person and mirror reflection in focus, background soft

subject.primary: person in warm amber tones standing before ornate golden-framed baroque mirror, looking at their reflection
subject.focal_point: the mirror reflection showing a different AI-constructed face with hollow crimson eyes looking back
subject.secondary: ornate golden mirror frame with biblical engravings along the border, glowing softly
props: baroque ornate golden mirror frame with biblical motif engravings
different AI-generated face in reflection with crimson hollow eyes
golden frame glow along engraving details
floating orange embers near mirror surface

environment.time_of_day: interior artificial light, single vanity bulb illumination
environment.atmosphere: identity theft, the AI already wearing your face

composition.rule: rule of thirds — person on left third, mirror occupying center and right, Ken Burns slow pan from person to reflection
composition.foreground: person's back and side in warm amber tones
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white empty theater dressing room — bare makeup counters, costumes on rack, theatrical lighting strips dark and cold

lighting.key_light: warm amber key light from left illuminating the real person
lighting.fill_light: crimson glow emanating from within the mirror reflection, illuminating the mirror area
lighting.rim_light: golden glow from the mirror frame engravings tracing the frame perimeter
lighting.mood: identity crisis, the horror of seeing yourself replaced

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

mood.emotion: existential dread, identity dissolution, the theft of self

symbolism.primary: the mirror showing a different face represents AI deepfake capability — your reflection is no longer yours
symbolism.secondary: biblical engravings on the mirror frame connect the ancient warning about false images to the modern technological reality

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
